abstract: Best practices and API reference for the Terra Lab Reports API (pre-release): converting clinical lab report PDFs and images into structured, standardized biomarker data with canonical biomarker keys, UCUM unit codes, and LOINC codes. Covers the async upload/standardize/deliver lifecycle, the lab_report.completed / lab_report.failed event envelope, the layered result model (source, biomarker, measurement, interpretation, reference ranges), unmatched-biomarker handling, snowflake IDs, and idempotent webhook processing.
